steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The strongest signal is “occupied greatly,” indicating Mrs. Sommers’ deep engagement and focus on how to spend her money.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice A captures this deeply engaged state by describing her walking around but being truly immersed in financial speculations and calculations.
The other options depict different aspects of Mrs. Sommers’ character or experiences, unrelated to the engagement with spending decisions.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
